LanguageData.ARA_AcidCoverd.label: Arachne acid
LanguageData.ARA_AcidCoverd.description: An Arachne Zerg with an acid sac sprayed strong acid at the person. The contaminated liquid would make the person miserable, soften the armor and skin, and continue to burn its body.
LanguageData.ARA_AcidCoverd.stages.0.label: minor
LanguageData.ARA_AcidCoverd.stages.1.label: minor
LanguageData.ARA_AcidCoverd.stages.2.label: moderate
LanguageData.ARA_AcidCoverd.stages.3.label: serious
LanguageData.ARA_AcidCoverd.stages.4.label: extreme
LanguageData.ARA_AcidCoverd.stages.5.label: completely
LanguageData.ARA_ToxicBuildup.label: Arachne neurotoxin
LanguageData.ARA_ToxicBuildup.description: The neurotoxin carried by Arachne's poison needle is attacking the colonist. This powerful toxin will quickly incapacitate the target and cause nausea and dizziness, and may also cause permanent brain damage.
LanguageData.ARA_ToxicBuildup.stages.0.label: initial
LanguageData.ARA_ToxicBuildup.stages.1.label: initial
LanguageData.ARA_ToxicBuildup.stages.2.label: minor
LanguageData.ARA_ToxicBuildup.stages.3.label: moderate
LanguageData.ARA_ToxicBuildup.stages.4.label: serious
LanguageData.ARA_ToxicBuildup.stages.5.label: extreme
LanguageData.ARA_SkyhiveBite.label: Sky Nest Zerg Attachment
LanguageData.ARA_SkyhiveBite.description: A cute Skynest Arachne bug bites you, and the bug will keep biting you until it breaks away from you. That wouldn't be too much of a problem...right?
LanguageData.ARA_Beam.label: bioenergetic rays
LanguageData.ARA_ReinforceGasCoverd.label: Arachne pheromone contamination
LanguageData.ARA_ReinforceGasCoverd.description: You are contaminated with Arachne's pheromones, and something is coming from underground.
LanguageData.ARA_Unburnable.label: flame retardant smoke
LanguageData.ARA_Unburnable.description: A special kind of smoke covered the area, making it difficult for colonists to be set alight.
LanguageData.ARA_ChainReload.label: chain loading
LanguageData.ARA_ChainReload.description: The weapon used has chain reloading capability, and the reloading speed will increase with each shot.
LanguageData.ARA_ChainReload.stages.0.label: Level 1/5
LanguageData.ARA_ChainReload.stages.1.label: Level 2/5
LanguageData.ARA_ChainReload.stages.2.label: Level 3/5
LanguageData.ARA_ChainReload.stages.3.label: Level 4/5
LanguageData.ARA_ChainReload.stages.4.label: Level 5/5
LanguageData.ARA_BeamAiming.label: Beam warm-up
LanguageData.ARA_BeamAiming.description: The Arachne Swarm's beam-like energy weapons can fire continuously after being briefly aimed.
LanguageData.ARA_BeamAiming.stages.0.label: Finish
LanguageData.ARA_Fighter_Execution_Damage.label: execution
LanguageData.ARA_Fighter_Execution_Damage.description: Deals massive damage to finish the target.
LanguageData.ARA_Whip_Hediff.label: whipped
LanguageData.ARA_Whip_Hediff.description: The Arachne Zerg's soft-bodied weapon hit the colonist - and that hurt.
LanguageData.ARA_Hediff_FrostCoverd_after.label: frost cover
LanguageData.ARA_Hediff_FrostCoverd_after.description: This person is covered by a cloud of frost and is about to explode with frost and mist.
LanguageData.ARA_CryoShock.label: rapid cooling
LanguageData.ARA_CryoShock.description: The target is in a frozen state. This state will cause the target's body structure to be extremely fragile. When this effect intensifies, body parts may be directly destroyed by cryodamage.
LanguageData.ARA_Genestealer_ExtractGene_Hediff.label: Forced stripping
LanguageData.ARA_Genestealer_ExtractGene_Hediff.descr: The Arachne mutant forcibly removed part of the genetic sequence from the colonist, which resulted in the colonist being no longer able to maintain basic physiological activities. The damage is irreversible, even if the genes are plugged back.
LanguageData.ARA_Dissolver_Touch_Damage.label: lipolytic acid
LanguageData.ARA_Dissolver_Touch_Damage.description: Arachne's fat-dissolving species sprays a large amount of fat-dissolving acid on this target, and its body will soon turn into gelatinous insect nectar. \n\nHow pitiful.
